Hardware Component File

Cluster _XBG_3.5 InchTFT_V7.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference Cluster__XBG_3.5_Inch_TFT_V7.0_20201209T111233.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 743
Receive ID 763
Functional Addr 51
Functional Name TDB
